RT @Chad_MORadioTV: We had a great conversation with Senator @HawleyMO today. We discussed the need for ownership rules to reflect the comp…

Mother of Survivor: "Because they’re making money - the bottom line is profit."

Sen. Hawley: "Profit. 25 years later, your daughter’s material is https://t.co/93COHUxu69
